name: clarvia
description: AI Agent Tool Directory & AEO Scanner — Search 15,400+ tools scored for agent readiness. 16 tools for searching, scanning, gate-checking, comparing, trending, and AEO optimization.

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Search 15,400+ AI agent tools by keyword, category, or AEO score

tools.name: scan_service
tools.description: Run a full AEO audit on any URL for agent discoverability and quality

tools.name: get_service_details
tools.description: Get detailed AEO evaluation report for a previously scanned service

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all tool categories with service counts

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate directory statistics — total services, average score, distribution

tools.name: register_service
tools.description: Submit a new tool or API for Clarvia indexing and AEO scoring

tools.name: clarvia_gate_check
tools.description: Quick pass/fail safety check for agent tool-use decisions with agent grade

tools.name: clarvia_batch_check
tools.description: Batch-check up to 10 URLs — pass/fail and agent grade for each

tools.name: clarvia_find_alternatives
tools.description: Find higher-rated alternative tools in a category by agent-readiness score

tools.name: clarvia_probe
tools.description: Live accessibility probe — reachability, latency, OpenAPI, MCP, agents.json

tools.name: clarvia_submit_feedback
tools.description: Report tool usage outcome to build community reliability data

tools.name: register_my_setup
tools.description: Register your current tool setup to get AEO scores and category rankings. Returns a setup_id for benchmarking and upgrade recommendations.

tools.name: compare_my_setup
tools.description: Compare your registered tool setup against higher-scored alternatives in each category. Identify weak spots and find better-rated replacements.

tools.name: recommend_upgrades
tools.description: Get personalized tool recommendations based on your registered setup — high-scoring tools you don't have yet, in existing and adjacent categories.

tools.name: clarvia_report_issue
tools.description: Report a bug, feature request, question, or security issue with Clarvia or any indexed tool. Creates a tracked ticket.

tools.name: clarvia_list_issues
tools.description: List existing CS tickets — check status of reported issues, see known bugs, or find feature requests to upvote.
